visual_description: In a dimly lit setting, a close-up shows tangled metal wires and pipes. A gray‑haired man in a suit turns his head sharply, looking back with a startled expression while another figure stands behind him. The scene shifts to a group of people in a tiled room, some seated at a table with bowls while others stand, and a man in a dark suit stands near a doorway with a red diamond sign, gazing forward.
audio_description: The audio is not clearly audible.
